key_findings: protocol required_fields are not uniformly enforced across ledgers
proposal item_id references resolve, but naming conventions are not normalized
peer_review entries omit required evidence field across all observed records
review verdict vocabulary is unstandardized across commanders
improvement lineage fields are schema-inconsistent across records
protocol required_fields omit improvement-specific lineage keys
consensus ledger has schema compliance violations in evidence and based_on fields
consensus verdict and status vocabularies are semantically ambiguous
broadcast linkage fields are inconsistent between consensus_item_id and adopted_items
broadcast source_refs and adopt wording are not normalized

top_themes: protocol required_fields are not enforced consistently across ledger event types
event-specific linkage and verdict vocabularies are underspecified and inconsistent
evidence and source_refs typing/precision drift weakens automation and traceability
adoption path semantics are blurred by inconsistent consensus and broadcast linkage fields
recommended_followups: standardize verdict and linkage field vocabularies before synthesis/adoption consumers depend on them
validate required evidence/source_refs fields at write time or in a ledger QA pass
